heading: Concurrent Queries
body:
- Running more than *30 simultaneous queries* on an federated database instance is not supported.

If your aggregation pipeline only contains the [$currentOp](determine-query-status) stage, Atlas Data Federation doesn't enforce the limit on
the maximum number of simultaneous queries. You can run queries that
only contain the [$currentOp](determine-query-status) stage even
after you reach the maximum number of simultaneous queries.
